name: octogon
description: Compare the cost and accuracy of your GitHub Copilot models, side by side, against any open repository.

viewsWelcome.contents:
Compare the cost and accuracy of your GitHub Copilot models, side by side.

[$(rocket) Open Octogon](command:octogon.open)

The comparison opens in a full-width editor panel.

octogon.pricingTablePath.markdownDescription: Absolute path to an override token-pricing JSON file. When empty, the bundled pricing table is used. The override must match the bundled schema (`aiCreditUsd`, `unit`, `models`).

octogon.expectedOutputTokens.markdownDescription: Assumed output tokens per model used for the **pre-run** cost estimate. The post-run cost reflects actual tokens.

octogon.retrieval.topK.markdownDescription: Number of snippets pulled by lightweight repo retrieval when retrieval is enabled.

octogon.judgeModelId.markdownDescription: Preferred model id for LLM-as-judge scoring. When empty, Octogon picks a strong available model.

octogon.verifyCommand.markdownDescription: Build/test command used for **automated verification** of code tasks (e.g. `npm test`). Default unset (verification disabled). Always shown before running.

scripts.build: npm run build:extension && npm run build:webview
